Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY AMMO
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 41
DMG: 33 Dmg Bonus: 144 AC: -15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
DEX: -10 INT: -10 AGI: -15
SV DISEASE: -15 SV POISON: -15
WT: 15.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR SHD BER
Race: BAR TRL OGR VAH
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

#Anonymous, Posted: Sep 01 2001 at 7:16 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) anybody ELSE notice that at the top it says "Weapon Skill: Two Hand Blunt"? Meaning.. it's not a throwing weapon. You might wanna read a little closer..
RE: hm...
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2001 at 9:57 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1683505057400
151 posts
anybody ELSE notice that the screen shot says "RANGE: 50" That means it CAN be thrown. Anyother ideas bright one? Keep them to yourself next time.

# Aug 15 2001 at 6:49 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
U think the ratio is awesome?
YES 33/41 is awesome but this is a RANGE item
I agree with ROFLMAO guy.
If u get this weapon. Sell it to someone who appears to be gullible and only looks at dmg/dly stats for 1k or more. Otherwise destroy it if no buyers. I think merchants should either ROFL or consider u KOS for considering selling this to them.

# Feb 21 2001 at 9:53 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
not every item off a high lvl mob has to be good just because of where ya got it. I think this weapon is not good or bad, just a weapon, 33/41 is awesome, the stats minuses punish the weilder of this weapon rightly so. Use it or not, I would use it at times if I was able to.

Elarian Tinesthai
▲ Page top
RE: lol what a crappy weapon
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2001 at 1:47 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I think the ratio is AWESOME and the stats are harmful but you can counter that with some jewlry. If you are high enough to get this item then you can get some nice + items and with a fbss you would be hitting in the 100s non stop! i think this weapon should be very popular. If i was high enough to get it i would use it HANDS DOWN!!!


happy hunting =)
